title: carex × ferdinandi-sauteri
intro: Carex × ferdinandi-sauteri, also known as Ferdinand Sauter's sedge, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the Carex genus of sedges. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are derived from its rich content of flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Carex × ferdinandi-sauteri include its ability to help alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and other genitourinary issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve circulation. Herbal preparations of Carex × ferdinandi-sauteri can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to support urinary and genitourinary health.
